title: New Potato and Hash Brown Delight
description: A simple and delicious breakfast recipe featuring new potatoes and hash browns, ideal for a cozy morning.
instructions: Peel and chop the new potatoes into 1-inch cubes.
Place the potato cubes in a bowl and drizzle with canola oil.
Season with salt and black pepper. Toss to coat.
Transfer the potatoes to a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
While the potatoes are roasting, prepare the hash browns according to package instructions.
Once the potatoes are done, remove from the oven and top with hash browns.
Garnish with baby potatoes and serve hot.
Optional: serve with a side of fresh herbs or a dollop of vegan sour cream.
